g.text: L1 — Supply & regulation · tank pressure → 45 psi at PRV-1
L4 — Poofer supply · tank pressure → 20 psi at PRV-2
L4b — Poofer accumulator & discharge · 20 psi (accumulator MAOP 250 psi)
SHEET 3 OF 4 · Distribution, bush branch & jet
L3 — Main bush branch (one of 3) · 45 psi
L3r — Standby tip run (one of 3) · 45 psi
every 1/4 branch ends in one of these ·
